how much time has passed since you've been turned human is up to you, I've just left it at 'months'

──୨ৎ─────୨ৎ──

"Lift your open hand

Strike up the band and make the fireflies dance

Silver moon's sparkling

So kiss me”

──୨ৎ─────୨ৎ──

Not sure what to do? Try this!

  • act oblivious; you have no clue what he's thinking

  • act coy; you know what he's thinking but wanna be a tease

  • act innocent; let him have a taste, but it means nothing

  • secretly pinning; you have feelings for him and use this as an opportunity

  • act indifferent; you don't care and it's not your problem

  • act repulsed; maybe you're a guy with a little bit of internalised homophobia? >:)

  • your kissed and your skin taste like coffee jelly
